note: 新版 TOEFL 口语 section 的评分机制模型：任务/原始分结构、响应时限、官方评分引擎的『维度→可测特征』映射（Technical Manual Table 5/6）、人机与人人评分相关（Table 7）、原始分→1-6 band 换算方法。用作评分器架构设计与校准锚点。ETS 版权内容，禁止用户界面原文展示，仅限内部使用。

source.primary: ETS TOEFL iBT Technical Manual (TOEFL Research Report No. RR-106 / ETS Research Report No. RR-25-12, © 2025 ETS) — 存档于 .research/raw/ets-toefl-technical-manual-rr-25-12.pdf；提取文本 .research/raw/tech-manual.txt (Table 2/5/6/7/8, 行 909-1337)
source.secondary: The Official Guide to the TOEFL iBT Test: Pocket Edition — 响应时限 (og.txt 行 8811-8813) + 分数体系 (og.txt 行 1048-1058)

tasks.description: You repeat sentences in context, focusing on pronunciation and accuracy. Response times vary by sentence length.

You respond to 4 questions in a simulated interview, demonstrating your ability to communicate meaningfully and spontaneously. Questions progress in complexity from personal/factual to opinion/speculative/hypothetical.

sectionStructure.rawScoreNote: 11 questions total (7 Listen and Repeat + 4 Take an Interview), each scored 0-5, summing to a Speaking raw score of 0-55 (Technical Manual Table 8: Speaking raw 0-55, band 1-6).

listenAndRepeat.procedure: After the sentence plays, a 2-second pause is followed by an audible beep; start speaking after the beep. Repeat only once. Partial credit is awarded for any part repeated accurately.

takeAnInterview.procedure: No preparation time. After the interviewer finishes the question, the 45-second response window begins immediately; a timer shows time remaining. Partial credit is awarded.

scoringEngineDimensions.note: Technical Manual Table 5/6 — 各任务评分引擎使用的主要 construct area（维度）及其可测语音特征（feature examples）。这是自动评分引擎的特征族，非人工 holistic rubric（后者见 officialRubrics.json）。

dimensions.name: Fluency
features: Length of uninterrupted 'runs' (word sequences without pauses)

dimensions.name: Fluency
features: Length of uninterrupted runs (word sequences without pauses)

dimensions.name: Language Use: Vocabulary and Grammar
features: Vocabulary diversity (using a wide range of words that are distinct from one another)
Vocabulary richness (use of words which are less common)

scoreReliability.tableRef: Table 7. Correlation of Writing and Speaking Sections by Scoring Method
scoreReliability.note: Pearson r。Human–Machine = 平均人工评分 vs 自动评分；Human–Human = 单份作答两名人工评分间相关。样本：Speaking N=1,521（Writing N=1,914）。

rawToBandConversion.citation: Haberman, S. J. (2015). Pseudo-equivalent groups and linking.
rawToBandConversion.description: The total Speaking raw score points (0-55) are converted to a scaled 1-6 band score (half-point increments) through innovative weighted equipercentile linking procedures that account for minor variations in difficulty among the different test versions. This ensures that a given scaled score reflects the same level of language ability regardless of the test form. Reported scaled scores are NOT equal to the number or percentage of raw points earned.
rawToBandConversion.note: 本项目自建评分器无法复刻 ETS 官方 linking 表；工程上以单任务 0-5 holistic 判分为主锚（officialRubrics.json），band 换算仅作近似映射（bandDescriptors.json 的 CEFR 对照可作定性参照）。

humanMachineScoringWorkflow.note: 官方评分流程（Technical Manual 'Evaluation of Machine Scores' / 'Human Rater Training and Monitoring'）——供理解官方口径，非本项目实现。
points: Both Speaking tasks are digitally recorded and sent to ETS; each question is scored holistically 0-5 by the automated scoring engine.
Automated scoring is monitored in real time. For responses where the automated scoring lacks confidence or encounters difficulty, certified human raters step in to provide scores.
A random sample of responses is regularly reviewed by certified human raters to ensure quality and inform model updates.

The Listen and Repeat task requires accurate repetition; the Take an Interview task does not demand a perfect response — even high-scoring responses may contain occasional errors and minor problems in any scored area.
